title: Hideg napok
actors: Zoltán Latinovits, Iván Darvas, Tibor Szilágyi
plot: Set in 1946, this movie deals with the planning and execution of the January, 1942 Novi Sad massacre of 4,000 Yugoslavian Serbs and Jews by Hungarian army units. It was undertaken as a reprisal for a partisan ambush (in which 17 s...
